title: Afghan schemes: funding instructions 2025 to 2026 and interim data sharing protocol
body: "These documents tell local authorities what funding is available to support the: Afghan Resettlement Programme (ARP). They explain:   how the funding works how local authorities can use it to support Afghans how to claim funding   They apply to the 2025 to 2026 financial year.   The interim data sharing protocol has been withdrawn. It is included for reference.    We are aware these publications may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing them so that we can fix these. Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "

taxons.title: Support for asylum claimants and refugees
